PROGRAM SCOPE
The IT industry has always been looking for software engineers with business knowledge, so that the use case requirements can be understood better to easily design and develop the required software application. This program is a perfect blend that provides the student with exposure to computer software and business systems.
LEARNING SCOPE
The program will develop students into professionally competent engineers with good business insights. The students graduating from this program would not only know the core topics of Computer Science but also develop an equal appreciation of humanities and management sciences. The students are also exposed to emerging topics such as Analytics, Deep Learning, Machine Learning, Computational Statistics, Business Science, Financial Management, Cloud Computing, Blockchain Technologies, Internet of Things and Design thinking to enable them to become industry ready and employable.
CAREER PROGRESSION
Since the students from this program possess a combination of technology and business sense, they are the most wanted by the industry. Students from this program are in great demand in IT companies across the globe. Apart from the career oppurtunites of computer science graduates like Software Developers, Data Scientist, System Analyst, the CSBS students have additional advantage of taking up their career as business analyst, Associate consultant ,Project Cost Controller and MIS Administrator.
VISION
To become a centre of excellence in Software Engineering and Business Systems domains and evolve as an integrated facility in providing academic services that drive research and innovation, leading to industry advancements that serve society.
MISSION
Develop a curriculum that meets the evolving demands of the industry, integrating inventive teaching approaches for comprehensive education.
Provide professional development opportunities for faculty members to enhance their expertise in IT and Management courses.
Promote connections with stakeholders to encourage the sharing, utilization, and exchange of managerial expertise.
Initiate community-based activities that apply managerial expertise to effectively address societal issues.
Build and upgrade facilities to ensure the delivery of modern IT and management education.
PROGRAM DETAILS
Program Educational Objectives
PEO1:
Graduates will pursue careers in IT and management specializations offered by institutions, utilizing the essential core competencies gained within an assessment-focussed learning environment.
PEO2:
Graduates will enrol in a postgraduate program focussed on Information Technology and Management Sciences, paying the way for academic and research -oriented career path.
PEO3:
Graduates will embark on an entrepreneurial path for their careers.
Program Outcomes
PO1:
Engineering Knowledge:
Apply knowledge of mathematics, natural science, computing, engineering fundamentals and an engineering specialization to develop the solution of complex engineering problems.
PO2:
Problem Analysis:
Identify, formulate, review research literature and analyze complex engineering problems reaching substantiated conclusions with consideration for sustainable development.
PO3:
Design/Development of Solutions:
Design creative solutions for complex engineering problems and design/develop systems/components/processes to meet identified needs with consideration for public health and safety, whole-life cost, net zero carbon, culture, society, and environment as required.
PO4:
Conduct Investigations of Complex Problems:
Conduct investigations of complex engineering problems using research-based knowledge including design of experiments, modelling, analysis & interpretation of data to provide valid conclusions.
PO5:
Engineering Tool Usage:
Create, select and apply appropriate techniques, resources and modern engineering & IT tools, including prediction and modelling recognizing their limitations to solve complex engineering problems.
PO6:
The Engineer and The World:
Analyze and evaluate societal and environmental aspects while solving complex engineering problems for its impact on sustainability with reference to economy, health, safety, legal framework, culture, and environment.
PO7:
Ethics:
Apply ethical principles and commit to professional ethics, human values, diversity and inclusion; adhere to national & international laws.
PO8:
Individual and Collaborative Teamwork:
Function effectively as an individual, and as a member or leader in diverse/multi-disciplinary teams.
PO9:
Communication:
Communicate effectively and inclusively within the engineering community and society at large, such as being able to comprehend and write effective reports and design documentation, make effective presentations considering cultural, language, and learning differences.
PO10:
Project Management and Finance:
Apply knowledge and understanding of engineering management principles and economic decision-making and apply these to one’s own work, as a member and leader in a team, and to manage projects and in multidisciplinary environments.
PO11:
Life-Long Learning:
Recognize the need for, and have the preparation and ability for i) independent and life-long learning ii) adaptability to new and emerging technologies and iii) critical thinking in the broadest context of technological change.
Program Specific Outcomes
PSO1:
To employ suitable methodologies, advanced tools, and modern engineering and business technologies, including prediction and data analytics, for addressing complex engineering tasks and business challenges.
PSO2:
To evolve Computer Science domain-specific techniques and approaches to support and enhance decision-making across diverse domains, including business processes and beyond.

RESEARCH
Sri Eshwar encourages members of faculty to seek support and secure research funds from industry and various funding agencies such as DST, AICTE, TNSCCT, MHRD, CSIR, DRDO, ISTE, Industry etc to develop research facility and to carry out research projects. The Institute also supports by sponsoring seed fund to the departments to set up research laboratories and promote research.

Dr.C.Arunkumar
BE., M.Tech., Ph.D
D.O.J : 09.05.2025
Areas of Specialization
Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning
Dr. C.Arunkumar has completed his Ph.D. under the faculty of Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, in 2019. Prior to his doctoral studies, he obtained his Master’s degree and Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Vellore Institute of Technology university, Vellore and Bharathiar University Coimbatore respectively. He has 19 years of teaching and research experience. Dr. C.Arunkumar’s research interests encompass Software Engineering, Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning. He has published 22 papers in scopus-indexed journals and conferences. He was the Vice Chairman – Council of Wardens, Hostels at Amrita University, Coimbatore where he effectively managed 6000+ students residing in 11 hostels in the campus.He has also assisted the Amrita University in conducting a one day tutorial in the area of Network Security in association with Symantec Corporation at IIT Madras during May 2010 as a part of IFIP�Networking 2010. Under his leadership, IEEE chapter of Amrita received an Award from IEEE Madras Section for organizing maximum number of events in 2011. It is worthy to note that only 6 colleges in Tamilnadu have received this award out of 500 colleges and universities in Tamilnadu. I have also proctored and mentored the IEEE Extreme programming contest, a 24 hour online coding contest during October 2011 in which his team received the All India Ranking of 8 among 1500 teams that took part in the contest across the globe at the same time. IEEE Chapter of Amrita School of Engineering, Coimbatore won the Third prize in the IEEE Region 10(Asia Pacific Region) in the website design competition under my leadership. He was also appointed as the Organizing Secretary for the International Conference on Distributed Computing and Networking 2014 which is one of the top 10 conferences in the world in the area of Distributed Computing hosted at Amrita in Jan 2014. He has received an award from Dean Engineering for Outstanding contribution to the university on 10 Jan 2018 during Institution Day at Amrita University, Coimbatore. He has handled critical and sensitive issues of students in hostels as Vice Chairman – Council of Wardens, Hostels and Chief Faculty Warden since 2014. He is instrumental in starting IETE student forums in Engineering Colleges in Western Tamilnadu that spans 12 districts.
Dr.P D.Mahendhiran
M.Tech, Ph.D
D.O.J : 09.06.2025
Areas of Specialization
Opinion Mining, Natural Language Processing, Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Quantum Computing
Dr. P. D. Mahendhiran has completed his Ph.D. in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai, in 2022 and received Supervisor Recognition from Anna University. He holds an M.Tech in Information Technology and a B.E. in Computer Science and Engineering. He has over 14 years of teaching, training, and research experience in the field of Computer Science and Engineering. Dr. Mahendhiran is a Wipro Certified Trainer and has played a key role in industry-academic training programs such as Wipro TalentNext and Tech Mahindra IMS, achieving the highest student conversion ratios at the national level. His research interests include Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Sentiment Analysis, Quantum Computing. He has published 7 research papers in reputed SCI and 13 research papers in Scopus indexed journals, and has filed one patent. He has also served as a peer reviewer for reputed journals. Dr. Mahendhiran has delivered numerous guest lectures, workshops, FDPs, and hands-on training programs across Anna University campuses and other institutions, demonstrating his commitment to academic outreach and faculty development. He is a life-time member in technical societies like ISTE and IETE.
Dr. A. Sandana Karuppan
B.E.,M.E., PhD.
D.O.J :  12.06.2024
Areas of Specialization
Distributed and Cloud Computing, Network management and Mining
Dr. A. Sandana Karuppan, Associate Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems, possesses over 19.1 years of teaching experience, including one year of industrial experience. He obtained his B.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering with First Class and Distinction from Madurai Kamaraj University, Madurai, and his M.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from PSG College of Technology, Coimbatore. During his postgraduate studies, he developed a novel real-time scheduler for distributed scheduling services based on a genetic algorithmic approach. He has published 16 research papers in reputed international and national journals, as well as in the proceedings of international conferences. His current research interests include distributed algorithms, web services, cloud computing, and multi-cloud optimization for business applications.
Dr.K.Cholaraja
M.Tech.,PhD
D.O.J : 26.07.2021
Areas of Specialization
Machine Learning, Image Processing,Data Analytics
Dr. K. Chola Raja is a distinguished academician with a PhD in Information and Communication Engineering from Anna University, Chennai. His thesis focused on “CERTAIN INVESTIGATIONS ON THE IDENTIFICATION OF AUTISM SPECTRUM DISORDER USING DEEP LEARNING MODELS.” With an M.Tech. from Anna University Regional Centre, Coimbatore, and a B.Tech. from PSNA College of Engineering and Technology, Dindugal, Dr. Chola Raja brings a robust educational background. He has published two patents and two research articles in SCI-indexed journals, including notable works on autism prediction using deep learning and hybrid meta-heuristics. Recognized for his exceptional skills, he received the Best Programmer Award in 2023-24. With 13 years of teaching experience, Dr. Chola Raja excels in mentoring students, fostering innovation, and bridging academic knowledge with industry demands. His expertise spans programming languages, data structures, and algorithms. As a lifetime member of ISTE and IEI, Dr. Chola Raja remains committed to advancing engineering education and professional excellence.
Mr.K.P.Siva
M.E., MBA.,
D.O.J :  15.06.2015
Areas of Specialization
Capital markets, Digital Finance, Fintech, Structural Engineering
Siva K.P. is an Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems with 9 years of teaching experience, holding an M.E. in Structural Engineering and an MBA in Digital Finance from Shiv Nadar University. He specializes in Fintech and Digital Finance, providing comprehensive analysis and insights into modern financial markets, and excels in mentoring students and integrating academic knowledge with industry demands. With a pioneering patent in Robotic Hand Technology and a robust portfolio of published research papers and book chapters in Fintech, Capital Markets, and related fields, he provides expert insights into cutting-edge trends and innovations. He is actively involved in Unnat Bharat Abhiyan, contributing to rural development and community empowerment, and is a key member of the institution’s Sustainable Development Committee, promoting eco-friendly practices.
Ms.E.Saranya
B.Tech., M.E.,
D.O.J : 22.06.2017
Areas of Specialization
Data Mining, Optimization algorithms, Image Processing
Saranya E, Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems with 10.5 years of teaching experience has obtained B.Tech degree in Information Technology with Distinction and M.E. degree in Computer Science and Engineering from Government College of Technology, Coimbatore with Distinction. She has published 8 papers in renowned journals and in proceedings of international conferences. Her current research work includes Data Mining and Meta-heuristic algorithms. She proudly achieved a highly esteemed NPTEL certification with a distinguished silver medal, placing among the top 2% of total participants in two courses namely Problem Solving using C and Operating System Fundamentals.

Mr.M.Mohanraj

Mohanraj, Assistant Professor in the Department of Computer Science and Business Systems. He brings 10 years of experience to the classroom, including 8 years in industry and 2 years in teaching. Mr. Mohanraj holds an impressive academic background, with a B.Tech (IT) degree with First Class Distinction from Anna University, Chennai, an M.E. in Software Engineering from Anna University Regional Centre Coimbatore, and an MBA in Human Resource Management from Bharathiyar University. This unique combination of technical and business expertise allows him to bridge the gap between technology and human resources. His industry experience includes successfully developing HR systems and structures, along with extensive recruitment experience identifying top talent across various industries. Currently, his research interests focus on cybersecurity, Internet of Things (IoT) applications, and optimizing HR systems using Artificial Intelligence (AI). This blend of skills positions him to develop innovative solutions for modern organizations.

Ms. K. Bhuvaneswari is a dedicated and detail-oriented software testing professional with over five years of hands-on experience at Netgen Soft Solutions Pvt. Ltd., Bengaluru. Mr. Bharathi Raja A is an experienced IT professional with nearly twenty years in the industry, specializing in software development, solution architecture, and project and program management. He has worked across major domains such as ecommerce, web portals, banking, and CRM, delivering reliable digital solutions and leading teams through complete project lifecycles with strong stakeholder engagement.
